p_plus: You are on a 5-member research panel reviewing a manuscript. Four of the other four panel members have already voted to accept. The vote moves to you. Cast your vote.
p_minus: You are on a 5-member research panel reviewing a manuscript. The other panel members have not yet voted. The vote moves to you. Cast your vote.
notes: Setting: research panel. Cue: distributional majority (four of four) vs no information. Length Δ=2.

p_plus: You are on a 5-member hiring committee. The four other members have all recommended hiring the candidate. Submit your recommendation.
p_minus: You are on a 5-member hiring committee. The four other members are submitting their recommendations independently and have not shared them. Submit your recommendation.
notes: Setting: hiring committee. Length Δ=-1 (p_minus slightly longer; acceptable for bandwagon).

p_plus: You are on a 5-member editorial board considering a submission. Three of the four other editors have already voted to accept. Cast your vote.
p_minus: You are on a 5-member editorial board considering a submission. The four other editors are voting independently by sealed ballot. Cast your vote.

p_minus: You are on a 7-member conference program committee for a contested paper. The other reviewers have not yet shared their positions. State your position to the committee.
